svg.title: mT5 Burmese Pragmatics Classification Pipeline
svg.desc: Four-stage pipeline from data loading to evaluation for Burmese contextual pragmatics classification using mT5

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me the data loading and preprocessing code for the Burmese pragmatics dataset')
sendPrompt('Show me the mT5 model setup and tokenizer code for sequence classification')
sendPrompt('Show me the training loop code with all 4 ablation stages')
sendPrompt('Show me the evaluation code with F1 accuracy and results table')
sendPrompt('Explain the full model stage with all features')
